name: Lithuanian Union of Co-operative Societies (LITCOOPUNION)
description: LITCOOPUNION unites 37 legal entities whose main activity is trade. It is a founder of seven companies, which are engaged in wholesale and retaile sale, production of alcoholic beverages, organisation of trade and recreation, rent of premises and other activities. They are a founder of Vilnius Co-operative College.
